query:
SELECT p.id, p.nombre, 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM items WHERE proyectoId = p.id) as total_items,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM empresas WHERE proyectoId = p.id) as total_empresas,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM unidades WHERE proyectoId = p.id) as total_unidades,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM especialidades WHERE proyectoId = p.id) as total_especialidades,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM items WHERE proyectoId IS NULL) as items_sin_proyecto,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM empresas WHERE proyectoId IS NULL) as empresas_sin_proyecto,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM unidades WHERE proyectoId IS NULL) as unidades_sin_proyecto
FROM proyectos p ORDER BY p.id;
